summary: Wire meta-KB signals into IntegrationLayer SkillRL hooks — anti-pattern penalties and positive evidence boosts adjust skill promotion/demotion scores
root_cause: SkillRL promotion/demotion was based purely on usage frequency without considering meta-KB anti-pattern evidence or positive outcome history
fix_approach: Load meta-KB index in IntegrationLayer constructor (fail-open), compute skill adjustments in onBeforeAdviceReturn hook via _computeMetaKBSkillAdjustments() that penalizes skills matching anti-patterns and boosts skills matching positive path evidence

validation.notes: 4 new tests: anti-pattern penalty, positive boost, fail-open without meta-KB, fail-open without SkillRL. bun test exit 0.
